---
pagetitle: "Publications · Sushovan Majhi"
title: ""
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
listing:
  - id: preprints
    template: ../../ejs/preprints.ejs
    contents: preprints.yml
    categories: true
  - id: journals
    template: ../../ejs/journals.ejs
    contents: journals.yml
  - id: conferences
    template: ../../ejs/conferences.ejs
    contents: conferences.yml
  - id: thesis
    contents:
      - categories: [TDA,Applied Topology,Pattern Matching,Computational Geometry]
    template:  ../../ejs/thesis.ejs
---

```{=html}
<header class="masthead page">
  <div class="kicker">Sushovan Majhi</div>
  <div class="pub-title">Publications</div>
  <div class="edition">
    <span>11 preprints</span>
    <span>10 journal papers</span>
    <span>7 conference proceedings</span>
    <span>1 thesis</span>
  </div>
</header>
```

### Preprints
::: {#preprints}
:::

### Journals
::: {#journals}
:::

### Proceedings of Conferences and Workshops
::: {#conferences}
:::

### PhD Thesis
::: {#thesis}
:::
